    CV

    Education

    • MAG. INŽ. RAČ. IN MAT. (MAG) – Univerza v Ljubljani, Fakulteta za matematiko in fiziko, Currently
    • DIPL. INŽ. RAČ. IN MAT. (UN) – Univerza v Ljubljani, Fakulteta za računalništvo in informatiko, 2019
    • HIGH SCHOOL GRADUATE – Srednja tehniška šola Koper, 2016
    • VOLLEYBALL COACH, THIRD RANK – Univerza v Ljubljani, Fakulteta za šport, 2015

    Work Experience

    • STUDENT RESEARCHER – Jožef Stefan Institute, Department of Knowledge Technologies, 3/2020 - Current
      • Machine learning research
      • Wrote 2 journal papers
      • Helping with projects such as EU funded Food Nutrition Security Cloud
    • COUNCIL MEMBER – Klub Študentov Občine Piran, 11/2018 - Current
      • Help with organisation and promotion of events
      • Take care of club’s website
      • Attending meetings and voting for student related matters
    • COMPUTER PROGRAMMER – Mercury Processing, Summers 2017-2019
      • Helping with the development of a mockup Android app
      • Helping update an old version of an Android app
      • Making unit tests for different parts of the web app (in C#)
      • Creating a part of a web application (in C#)
    • COMPUTER PROGRAMMER – Actual I.T., Summer 2017
      • Helping to program different parts of a web application
      • Making JSON schemes
    • COACH – Volley Club Portorož, ŠD Piran, 6/2015 - 9/2016
      • Coaching children of different age groups
    • BUILDING CARETAKER - Volley Club Portorož, Summers 2012-2016
      • Taking care of beach volleyball fields
      • Selling volleyball courts
      • Helping to organise different tournaments
      • Working with money

    Skills

    Job-Related Skills

    • Programming Languages:
      • Main: Python, Java, Java for Android, C#
      • Working Knowledge: R, MATLAB, SQL, HTML, CSS, JavaScript, Markdown
    • Communication and Interpersonal Skills:
      • Good communication skills gained through selling volleyball courts at VC Portorož
      • Know how to work with kids from coaching
      • Can work well with a team of people
    • Organisational skills
      • Basic team leading skill from being a volleyball coach and help at KŠOP

    Languages

    • Mother tongue: Slovenian
    • English: C1 - C2
    • Italian: B1 - C1

    Competitions and Awards

    • Gold award for 11th place in mathematics competition (Vegovo priznanje) in 2015
    • First place in Google Hash Code 2019 in Slovenia and 256th in the world
    • Eight place in Predicting Generalization in Deep Learning, NeurIPS 2020 competition

    Publications

    • SNoRe: Scalable Unsupervised Learning of Symbolic Node Representations

      S. Mežnar, N. Lavrač and B. Škrlj, "SNoRe: Scalable Unsupervised Learning of Symbolic Node Representations," in IEEE Access, vol. 8, pp. 212568-212588, 2020, doi: 10.1109/ACCESS.2020.3039541.

    • Predicting Generalization in Deep Learning via Metric Learning – PGDL Shared task

      S. Mežnar and B. Škrlj, "Predicting Generalization in Deep Learning via Metric Learning -- PGDL Shared task" in NeurIPS 2020, arXiv eprints: 2012.09117

    • Prediction of the effects of epidemic spreading with graph neural networks
